message:
test(wave-16): add 44 pure data-type tests across 3 modules

Cover OracleSuite/OracleStats/OracleReport/OracleEntryReport,
ScenarioElement/StepKind/MinimizationStep/MinimizationReport,
and ConfigError/RaptorQConfig/ServerConfig/BackoffConfig/AdaptiveConfig/
ResourceConfig/TimeoutConfig/SecurityConfig/RuntimeProfile/ConfigLoader.
